mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms ( user_uuid, category_no, room_title, max_users, now_users, room_password, room_notice, room_private, room_thumbnail, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{categoryNo}, #{roomTitle}, #{maxUsers}, #{nowUsers}, #{roomPassword}, #{roomNotice}, #{roomPrivate}, #{roomThumbnail}, #{expiredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT room_no, user_uuid, category_no, room_title, max_users, now_users, room_password, room_notice, room_private, room_premium, room_thumbnail, created_at, updated_at, expired_at FROM rooms WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET room_notice = #{roomNotice}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.select: SELECT rp.part_no AS "partNo", rp.user_uuid AS "userUuid", rp.camera_stauts AS "cameraStauts" rp.mic_status AS "micStatus" r.user_name AS "userName" r.useremail AS "userName" u.user_profile_image AS "userProfileImage" FROM room_paricipants rp INNER JOIN users u ON rp.user_uuid = u.user_uuid WHERE rp.room_no = #{roomNo}
